description_long: This helmet features a sleek, angular design with a metallic red and gold color scheme reminiscent of advanced technology or superhero armor. The front faceplate is gold with sharp, geometric lines and distinct eye slits, giving it a bold, expressive appearance. The sides and rear are predominantly a glossy, deep red, with subtle panel lines and a smooth, rounded contour. The helmet appears to be constructed from a hard, reflective material, likely metal or high-grade plastic, with no visible ventilation or retention system. There are no visible logos, graphics, or decorative motifs, emphasizing a clean, high-tech aesthetic. The overall form is contoured to fit closely around the head, providing full coverage and protection.
description: A glossy, angular helmet with a gold faceplate and deep red sides, featuring a high-tech, minimalist design with no visible graphics or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold faceplate with sharp lines and eye slits, framed by the red shell.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, rounded red surface and the edge of the gold faceplate.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the seamless, glossy red back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the red shell and the angular transition to the gold faceplate.
